name: Circle
funFact: A circle has no corners and no edges!

name: Square
funFact: A square has 4 equal sides and 4 corners!

name: Triangle
funFact: A triangle is the strongest shape in building!

name: Star
funFact: Stars twinkle in the night sky!

name: Heart
funFact: The heart shape means love!

name: Diamond
funFact: Diamonds are the hardest natural material!

name: Rectangle
funFact: A rectangle has 2 long sides and 2 short sides!

name: Oval
funFact: An oval is like a stretched circle - like an egg!

name: Pentagon
funFact: A pentagon has 5 sides - like a house shape!

name: Hexagon
funFact: Hexagons have 6 sides - bees make hexagon honeycombs!

name: Octagon
funFact: An octagon has 8 sides - like a stop sign!

name: Crescent
funFact: A crescent is shaped like the moon!

name: Arrow
funFact: Arrows point the way to go!

name: Cross
funFact: A cross is made of two lines crossing!

name: Spiral
funFact: Spirals spin round and round like a snail shell!

name: Cube
funFact: A cube is a 3D square - like a dice!

name: Sphere
funFact: A sphere is a 3D circle - like a ball!

name: Cylinder
funFact: A cylinder is like a can or a tube!

name: Cone
funFact: A cone is like an ice cream cone shape!

name: Pyramid
funFact: Pyramids were built in Egypt thousands of years ago!
